title: Knoxville-East Tennessee Land Funnel Kit
corridor: I-75 / Knoxville / Maryville land search corridor
focus: Screen land opportunities by combining parcel due diligence, terrain risk, tax pressure, housing distress, and credit-access context.

counties.role: North I-75 entry and rural acreage gateway
counties.watch: Slope, floodplain pockets, utility access, and distance to Knoxville jobs.

counties.role: Oak Ridge, Clinton, and I-75 interchange land pressure
counties.watch: Industrial influence, lake proximity, TVA-related constraints, and commute routes.

counties.role: Knoxville core market and growth-pressure benchmark
counties.watch: Higher pricing, zoning friction, infill pressure, and parcel fragmentation.

counties.role: I-75 south corridor with lake and retirement-market influence
counties.watch: Development pressure, lake restrictions, HOA pockets, and access to utilities.

counties.role: West Knoxville acreage and Watts Bar / river influence
counties.watch: Floodplain, slope, road quality, and distance from employment centers.

counties.role: Maryville, Alcoa, airport, and foothills land demand
counties.watch: Foothill slopes, tourism spillover, county zoning, and sewer availability.

counties.role: Tourism and foothills spillover from Sevierville and Gatlinburg
counties.watch: Short-term rental pressure, steep terrain, wildfire access, and traffic exposure.

counties.role: North rural adjacency for lower-density acreage searches
counties.watch: Road frontage, utility depth, lender access, and resale liquidity.

funnel_scores.name: Land Supply
funnel_scores.signal: Available acreage, parcel size, land class, and owner concentration.

funnel_scores.name: Terrain Risk
funnel_scores.signal: USGS elevation, slope, access grade, and buildable-area screening.

funnel_scores.name: Flood Risk
funnel_scores.signal: FEMA flood hazard layers and stream-adjacent parcel checks.

funnel_scores.name: Tax Pressure
funnel_scores.signal: Assessment changes, tax burden, delinquency signals where public records allow.

funnel_scores.name: Credit Access
funnel_scores.signal: Mainstream branches, credit unions, high-cost lenders, and finance companies.

funnel_scores.name: Housing Distress
funnel_scores.signal: Foreclosure, eviction, bankruptcy, and county court filing context.

funnel_scores.name: Growth Pressure
funnel_scores.signal: Interstate access, Maryville/Knoxville commute reach, tourism, and subdivision pressure.

sources: Knox County property assessor and GIS
Blount County property assessor and GIS
Anderson, Campbell, Loudon, Roane, Sevier, and Union county property assessor records
source_plan.purpose: Create parcel-level land scoring, ownership rollups, assessed value checks, and county linkouts.

sources: Tennessee Department of Financial Institutions licensee records
NCUA credit union branch data where available
source_plan.purpose: Show mainstream credit access against high-cost credit and finance-company concentration.

sources: Tennessee court, foreclosure, eviction, and bankruptcy aggregate sources
source_plan.purpose: Add county-level debt burden and housing distress context without individual credit records.

sources: TDOT roads, interchanges, and traffic context
source_plan.purpose: Flag floodplain, steep slope, soil, access, and commute constraints before parcel outreach.

next_imports: Add parcel-level private shortlist scoring for the loaded Knoxville parcel summaries
Tennessee high-cost credit and finance-company license locations
County-level foreclosure, eviction, and bankruptcy filing aggregates
FEMA flood, USGS slope, and NRCS soil layers
TDOT / OSM I-75, Maryville, Alcoa, Oak Ridge, and Knoxville access scoring
